facade_colour: warm red-brown brick with dark brown trim

photo_observations.facade_colour_observed: warm red-brown brick with dark brown trim, buff brick accent bands
photo_observations.facade_condition_notes: Fair to good condition. Brick facade well-preserved. Some weathering at ground level. Large arched opening at ground floor is distinctive. Dark brown painted window frames and trim.
photo_observations.window_details: Ground floor has large rounded arch opening. Second floor has two windows with segmental arched heads. Gable has single pointed-arch or rectangular window. Dark brown painted frames.
photo_observations.door_details: Main entrance within large rounded arch opening at ground floor. Glass panelled door visible.
photo_observations.porch_details: Small stoop with steps up from sidewalk. White picket fence/railing visible at front.
photo_observations.decorative_details: Prominent rounded arch at ground floor. Segmental arched window heads at second floor. Pointed gable peak with decorative trim.
photo_observations.roof_type_observed: Steep front gable, classic bay-and-gable form
photo_observations.alterations_visible: Some modifications at ground level but overall form well-preserved. White picket fence/railing appears to be an addition.
photo_observations.notes: 2.5-storey Victorian bay-and-gable house in warm red-brown brick. Distinctive rounded arch at ground floor. Steep front gable with pointed window. Dark brown trim. White picket railing at front stoop. Well-preserved heritage character.

notes: 2.5-storey Victorian bay-and-gable. Red-brown brick, dark trim. Rounded arch at ground floor. Steep front gable.

facade_detail.composition: The street elevation spans roughly 5.2 metres across 3 storeys and is capped by a gable, consistent with its house-form typology.
facade_detail.opening_rhythm: The opening rhythm is vertically ordered across the facade, using windows, and 1 principal entrance.

facade_description: Three-storey detached house-form (c. 1889-1903), 5.2 m wide, in warm red-brown brick with a steep front gable. Distinctive rounded arch at ground floor with segmental arched window heads above. Dark brown trim, simple bargeboard at gable. Set back 2.0 m from the sidewalk with a front stoop and white picket railing.
